description_long: This helmet features a full head covering design with a smooth, rounded dome and a prominent, integrated gas mask at the front. The mask section includes a circular filter or respirator unit, which protrudes outward and is detailed with ridges and a central opening. The eye area is deeply recessed, forming two large, angular eye sockets that give the helmet a protective, almost intimidating appearance. The sides of the helmet are contoured to fit around the ears, with subtle sculpting that suggests ergonomic comfort. The back of the helmet is seamless and smooth, lacking any visible attachments or openings. The overall finish is matte and monochromatic, with no visible logos, graphics, or ventilation features.
description: A smooth, full-head helmet with a built-in gas mask and deep eye sockets, finished in a plain matte color. The helmet is seamless and lacks visible graphics, vents, or logos.
description_view_0: Front view shows the helmet's deep eye sockets and the prominent circular gas mask filter at the mouth area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the helmet's smooth, rounded dome and the protruding gas mask, as well as the contoured ear area.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the seamless, rounded back of the helmet with no visible features or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the helmet's smooth curvature and the gas mask's side profile.
